all.en: I never thought I would care about points from a convenience store.
all.zh: 我從來沒想過自己會在乎便利商店的點數。

all.en: However, my best friend kept telling me that I was missing out on great deals.
all.zh: 不過，我最好的朋友一直跟我說，我錯過了許多超划算的優惠。

all.en: One Saturday morning, I downloaded the 7-Eleven app and created an account.
all.zh: 某個週六早上，我下載了7-Eleven的應用程式並註冊帳號。

all.en: It took less than five minutes and asked only for very basic information.
all.zh: 註冊不到五分鐘，只要求填寫非常基本的資料。

all.en: At the counter, I scanned the app's barcode whenever I paid for anything.
all.zh: 在櫃台結帳時，無論買什麼，我都會掃描應用程式上的條碼。

all.en: Within two weeks, I had earned enough points for a free hot coffee.
all.zh: 短短兩週內，我就累積到足夠的點數，可以兌換一杯免費熱咖啡。

all.en: The app also offered surprising daily discounts on snacks and lunch boxes.
all.zh: 應用程式還提供零食和便當每日意想不到的折扣。

all.en: My favorite feature was the limited-time stamp campaign for small figurines.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的功能是限時的集點活動，可以換小公仔。

all.en: I quickly became one of those people who chase plastic toys with passion.
all.zh: 我很快就變成那種熱衷收集塑膠玩具的人。

all.en: My friend laughed, saying she had created a monster with the app.
all.zh: 我朋友笑著說，她用這個應用程式創造了一個怪物。

all.en: Still, saving a few dollars every week somehow felt strangely rewarding.
all.zh: 但每週能省下幾塊錢，不知為何就是讓我覺得特別有成就感。

all.en: By the end of the month, my desk drawer was full of small figurines.
all.zh: 到了月底，我的書桌抽屜裡塞滿了小公仔。

all.en: My friend visited and counted twenty-three different characters lined up in a row.
all.zh: 朋友來訪時，數出整整二十三個不同的角色排成一列。

all.en: She suggested I open a glass display case to show them off properly.
all.zh: 她建議我買一個玻璃展示櫃，好好地把它們展示出來。

all.en: I found a small wooden cabinet online and assembled it the next weekend.
all.zh: 我在網路上找到一個小木櫃，下個週末把它組裝起來。

all.en: The figurines fit perfectly across three shelves with room left for more.
all.zh: 公仔在三層架上擺得剛剛好，還留有空間可以再放更多。

all.en: My mother visited and asked if I planned to collect them my whole life.
all.zh: 媽媽來訪時，問我是不是打算收藏一輩子。

all.en: I laughed and said only until the campaigns finally stopped releasing new ones.
all.zh: 我笑著說，只到活動不再推出新款為止。

all.en: The app even started suggesting personalized lunch boxes based on my purchases.
all.zh: 應用程式甚至開始根據我的消費，推薦個人化的便當組合。

all.en: It was clearly tracking my habits, but I honestly did not mind at all.
all.zh: 它顯然在追蹤我的習慣，但老實說我一點也不介意。

all.en: That tiny barcode had quietly become part of my everyday Taiwanese routine.
all.zh: 那個小小的條碼，悄悄地融入了我每日的台灣生活。

all.en: By the end of the year, my figurine collection had swelled to over fifty pieces.
all.zh: 到了年底，我的公仔收藏已經增加到超過五十隻。

all.en: My mother suggested I sell duplicates online to make some extra cash.
all.zh: 媽媽建議我把重複的賣到網路上，賺點外快。

all.en: I posted a few photos on a local collectors' forum that very evening.
all.zh: 我當天晚上就在一個本地收藏家論壇上，貼了幾張照片。

all.en: Within hours, several buyers messaged me asking about the rarer characters.
all.zh: 幾個小時內，就有好幾個買家私訊我詢問比較稀有的角色。

all.en: I sold seven duplicates and instantly earned back half my coffee budget.
all.zh: 我賣掉了七隻重複的，馬上把咖啡預算賺回了一半。

all.en: One buyer offered to trade me a limited figurine I had been chasing.
all.zh: 有一位買家提議和我交換一隻我一直在追的限量公仔。

all.en: We met at a busy 7-Eleven near the train station the following Friday.
all.zh: 我們下個週五在火車站附近一間熱鬧的7-Eleven見面。

all.en: He turned out to be a friendly graphic designer with similar collecting habits.
all.zh: 原來他是位友善的平面設計師，收藏習慣和我很像。

all.en: We exchanged contact information and planned to swap duplicates every month.
all.zh: 我們交換了聯絡方式，計劃每個月固定交換重複的公仔。

all.en: A simple loyalty app, I realized, had quietly built me an entire new community.
all.zh: 我體會到，一個小小的會員應用程式，悄悄地為我建立了一個全新的社群。

all.en: By the next spring, our small collectors' group had grown to fifteen active members.
all.zh: 到了隔年春天，我們的小型收藏家群組已擴展到十五位活躍成員。

all.en: We started meeting once a month at a quiet cafe near the city library.
all.zh: 我們開始每個月在市立圖書館附近一間安靜的咖啡館聚會。

all.en: Members traded duplicates, shared release news, and discussed upcoming convenience store campaigns.
all.zh: 成員們交換重複品、分享發行消息，並討論即將推出的便利商店活動。

all.en: The graphic designer became my closest new friend within just a few months.
all.zh: 那位平面設計師在短短幾個月內，成了我最親近的新朋友。

all.en: He invited me to a small studio he ran with two artistic college roommates.
all.zh: 他邀請我去他的小工作室，那是他和兩位有藝術天分的大學室友合開的。

all.en: They were sketching original figurine designs they hoped to one day sell.
all.zh: 他們正在繪製原創公仔設計，希望有朝一日能販售出去。

all.en: I suggested they enter a national convenience store design competition that autumn.
all.zh: 我建議他們報名那年秋天舉辦的全國便利商店設計比賽。

all.en: To our delight, their design eventually won third place and a small prize package.
all.zh: 令人欣喜的是，他們的設計最後贏得第三名和一份小獎品。

all.en: The convenience store later released their figurine as part of a holiday campaign.
all.zh: 便利商店後來把他們的公仔設計，當成節慶活動的其中一款發行。

all.en: A loyalty app, I realized again, had quietly built dreams I had never imagined.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，一個會員應用程式，悄悄地築起了我從未想像過的夢想。

all.en: By the following winter, our small collectors' group had nearly fifty active members online.
all.zh: 到了隔年冬天，我們的小型收藏家群組，在網路上已擁有將近五十位活躍成員。

all.en: The graphic designer and his roommates released their own line of handmade collectible figurines.
all.zh: 那位平面設計師和他的室友，推出了自己設計的手工收藏公仔系列。

all.en: They invited every collector to a small launch party at a quiet local cafe.
all.zh: 他們邀請所有收藏家，到一間安靜的本地咖啡館參加小型發表會。

all.en: Nearly forty members arrived with carefully wrapped gifts and warmly excited tired smiles.
all.zh: 將近四十位成員帶著仔細包裝的禮物和疲憊但熱情興奮的笑容前來。

all.en: Their first edition sold out completely within the first relaxed hour of the evening.
all.zh: 他們的第一版在當晚輕鬆的第一個小時內，就完全售罄。

all.en: I bought three pieces as gifts for my mother, friend, and graphic designer himself.
all.zh: 我買了三隻，分別送給媽媽、朋友，還有那位平面設計師本人。

all.en: He laughed warmly and admitted that none of this would have happened without me.
all.zh: 他溫暖地笑著坦承，如果沒有我，這一切都不會發生。

all.en: A local newspaper later wrote a charming short article about our growing creative community.
all.zh: 後來一家本地報紙撰寫了一篇短短迷人的報導，介紹我們日益茁壯的創意社群。

all.en: We framed the article on the cafe wall as a quiet thoughtful shared memory.
all.zh: 我們把那篇報導裱框，掛在咖啡館的牆上，當作安靜貼心的共同回憶。

all.en: A loyalty app, I realized once more, had quietly built an entire small creative world.
all.zh: 我再一次體會到，一個會員應用程式，悄悄地築起了一個完整的小小創意世界。

all.en: The following spring, the graphic designer and his roommates rented their first real studio space.
all.zh: 隔年春天，那位平面設計師和他的室友租下了他們第一個真正的工作室空間。

all.en: I helped them paint the walls a warm cream color over two quiet busy weekends together.
all.zh: 我利用兩個安靜而忙碌的週末，協助他們把牆面漆成溫暖的奶油色。

all.en: They hired two of our collectors as part-time assistants to help with online order shipments.
all.zh: 他們從我們的收藏家中聘了兩位擔任兼職助理，協助處理線上訂單的出貨。

all.en: The studio quickly received small orders from a major Taipei department store gift section.
all.zh: 工作室很快收到了一家台北大型百貨公司禮品區的小型訂單。

all.en: I attended their first retail launch and quietly stood beside my friend with proud tearful eyes.
all.zh: 我參加了他們第一次的零售上架，安靜地站在朋友身旁，眼中含著驕傲的淚水。

all.en: A second convenience store chain reached out about an exclusive collaboration figurine series.
all.zh: 第二家便利商店連鎖品牌主動聯絡，洽談一個獨家合作公仔系列。

all.en: Our small collectors' group helped test prototypes during quiet weekday evenings at the studio.
all.zh: 我們的小型收藏家群組，在平日寧靜的傍晚於工作室協助測試樣品。

all.en: Members offered honest suggestions about colors, packaging, and the small handwritten thank-you cards.
all.zh: 成員們對顏色、包裝以及手寫的小感謝卡，提出了誠懇的建議。

all.en: The launch sold out nationwide within a single quiet Friday afternoon across every Taiwanese branch.
all.zh: 新品在一個寧靜的週五下午，於全台每一家分店銷售一空。

all.en: Holding the empty store shelf photo on my phone, I realized small loyalties had built lasting bridges.
all.zh: 手機裡握著空蕩店架的照片，我體會到小小的忠誠，已築起一座座長久的橋樑。

all.en: By the following summer, the studio had expanded into a small storefront on a quiet side street.
all.zh: 到了隔年夏天，工作室擴展為一家位於安靜小巷弄裡的小型實體店面。

all.en: They hosted monthly figurine workshops where customers could paint their own custom designs together.
all.zh: 他們每月舉辦公仔工作坊，讓顧客能一起彩繪自己客製化的設計。

all.en: I helped lead the very first beginner workshop on a warm rainy Saturday afternoon together.
all.zh: 我在一個溫暖多雨的週六下午，協助帶領了第一場初學者工作坊。

all.en: Eight excited customers painted tiny mascots and proudly photographed their finished work for social media.
all.zh: 八位興奮的顧客彩繪了小小的吉祥物，並驕傲地拍下完成品上傳社群媒體。

all.en: The workshops sold out three months in advance, drawing collectors from neighboring cities and towns.
all.zh: 工作坊提前三個月就完全額滿，吸引了鄰近城市與鄉鎮的收藏家。

all.en: A small documentary crew filmed our story for a streaming series about young Taiwanese creators.
all.zh: 一個小型紀錄片團隊為一個介紹台灣年輕創作者的串流節目，拍攝了我們的故事。

all.en: I appeared briefly on camera holding my very first plastic figurine from the original campaign.
all.zh: 我短暫入鏡，手裡拿著當初活動中收藏的第一隻塑膠公仔。

all.en: My mother watched the show twice and quietly admitted she had finally understood my hobby.
all.zh: 媽媽看了兩遍節目，安靜地坦承她終於理解了我的嗜好。

all.en: On the third anniversary of downloading the app, our group celebrated with a quiet dinner together.
all.zh: 在我下載應用程式三週年那天，我們群組一起以一頓寧靜的晚餐慶祝。

all.en: Looking around that warm table, I realized one tiny barcode had truly changed my whole life.
all.zh: 環顧那張溫暖的餐桌，我體會到一個小小的條碼，真的徹底改變了我的整個人生。
